text: Andrina was so helpful and informative during the consultation. She was also very comforting and reassuring that this process is going to be worth every penny in the long run. And she has had removal done so she knows EXACTLY what it's like and what to expect. That made me feel better that she wasn't just trying to tell me what she needs to for a consultation. She told me her experience and that automatically made me decide I was doing this FORSURE. Disney was my removal specialist, he talked me through the session. It was really hard and no it did not feel great but he was fast and careful. Him talking me through the pain and telling me how far along it was and if I needed breaks or anything was great and helped me lock in. It was also nice to have a stress ball to squeeze during lol. Another nice lady, forgot her name she is also a removal specialist, she was very nice and helped me get a great video and pictures of the session. All people working here are so friendly and kind and I'm excited to keep going back for my sessions. And for all who wanna know about the price, I can't tell you what the exact number can be because it varies on size, color etc etc etc. Just know that yes, it is more expensive than a tattoo BUT you have payment options/plans and they are super easy to sign up for. My total is 3000 for a big name on my chest, and 4 quarter sized hand tattoos. My monthly payments are low and work for me (166 a month) my total does not reflect what yours might be, yours could be way less or way more, get a consultation! It's worth it! Also, if you do the payment plan, you got unlimited sessions. Definitely better than going in and paying every session, that costs way more!!! I got my plan, I'm happy and I'm making my monthly payments to get rid of this ridiculous crap I have on my body so I can be happy and confident again. Thank you everyone at this studio, you guys are all amazing.
author: Spooky Grim

text: Very experienced and organized.The manager was great at explaining all the details of what is offered. Thank you!
author: Darren Tachine

text: It was a great experience. Staff was nice and created a good experience!
author: Lee Mutter

text:
I had an excellent experience with this tattoo removal business from start to finish. The staff was professional, knowledgeable, and made me feel comfortable right away. They took the time to explain the entire process, what to expect during each session, and answered all my questions without rushing me.
The facility itself was clean and well-maintained, which gave me a lot of confidence in their work. The treatment was quicker than I expected, and while there was some discomfort, the technician made sure I was as comfortable as possible throughout.
After a few sessions, I’ve already noticed a significant difference in the fading of my tattoo. What really stood out to me was their honesty—they set realistic expectations and didn’t overpromise results.
If you’re considering tattoo removal, I highly recommend this place. They combine professionalism with genuine care, and it really shows in both the experience and the results.
author: George Flores

text: Great experience, Disney and andrina helped me out and were great !
author: No Luck Tattoos

text: Disney has been lasering my hand tattoos and it’s looking awesome.  He’s always patient and encouraging.  He does an excellent job every time on both color and black ink.  100% confident there’s no better place to go for tattoo removal!

text: Amazing! Super quick and I didn’t even have to flinch. My brows are legit gone after 1 session. Money well spent to people with years of experience! We powered through it as a last patient on a Saturday. Thank you to Andrina, Disney and Foujan for taking care of me! I cannot recommend a better place. Had I  realized it was here for 6 years, I would have gone sooner!

text: What a great first experience! Finally getting my two tattoos removed. Andrina and Foujan were absolutely wonderful. Explained everything so clearly and made me feel comfortable! Can’t wait to see these tattoos gone!!

text: Great hospitality.

text: I wish I had come in sooner!! Andrina and Disney were so kind, welcoming, and informative. I had been putting off getting my eyebrow tattoos laser removed for over a year because the idea of scheduling multiple visits for a consultation and then the service itself was intimidating as a single mom. They were able to get me in the same day and I only ended up needing one session ($400) for a full removal. Thank you so much guys!!

text: Disney is a great guy! It was a great experience

text: Everyone was very professional and kind they have great services and great pricing .very knowledgeable and patient .they also have payment plans that are available. Would definitely recommend this place.

text:
I had a great experience with my tattoo laser removal here at Removing!
From the very beginning, the staff has been extremely kind, and professional. They really make you feel comfortable and do their best to make the session as smooth and relaxing as possible.

Even after just my second session, I can already see a huge difference. One of my tattoos has almost completely faded, which honestly exceeded my expectations.

I truly appreciate how caring and supportive the team is throughout the process. I highly recommend them to anyone considering tattoo removal.
author: Stephanie Scaranto

text: The staff at Removery are not only friendly, they are extremely knowledgeable and passionate about their field.  Their priority is to understand your goal, then suggest an appropriate package.  After 4 sessions my tattoo appears to look like a faint bruise.   I'm confident after 1-2 more seesions, it will no longer be visible.  Well worth the investment if considering a full or partial removal.
author: Stephanie Baptiste

text: Disney’s the man. Most professional, very grateful for him!!
author: Karen Marin

text: Great experience today!!!! Andrina and Disney were amazing. I had an SMP artist who went in too far in my temples making me look like the ultimate warrior lol…Disney cleaned it up and looks way better. Simple process and overall great experience! Highly recommended if you need any type of removal work. Price was reasonable as well.
author: Brian Pfau

text: If you need a tattoo removed, these folks are the best! true professionals!

text: Quick and friendly service
author: Nini

text:
I had my old eyebrow permanent makeup removed at the Kearny Mesa location, and it was honestly the best experience I've had with any cosmetic procedure. The administrative team member, Andria, was incredibly informative and understanding from the first call—she answered all my questions patiently and made me feel completely at ease about the process.
The nurse, Foujan, was absolutely amazing—skilled, gentle, and professional throughout. I was surprised and thrilled that just one session completely removed all the old tattoo pigment with only very mild discomfort (barely noticeable!). The absolute best part? There was zero damage to my existing natural brow hair—my brows look fuller and more natural than ever.
The facility is clean, modern, and the whole team is so welcoming. If you're considering eyebrow tattoo removal (especially non-laser options like dermablading), I can't recommend this place highly enough. Thank you, Andria and Foujan—you made this so easy and gave me the results I dreamed of!
author: Andrea Greenberg

text: I really like this place! It is  clean, the girls that helped me out ( Andrina-Foujan) were really helpful, they explained everything good, and listened to questions both really helpful and professional :) the process was quick it does hurt but is manageable even tho I thought it was impossible to remove that tattoo they reassured me that it was possible,  im on my second session and I can see good results,  so thank you!
author: Karina Lizarraga

text: Andrina was very helpful in answering all of my questions and Allison was great as well and made me feel very comfortable during the whole process.

text:
From day one it’s always been the same energy calm, welcoming, never awkward, never rushed. They genuinely listen, answer every concern about post-op care and make you feel heard the whole process. You can tell they truly put their clients first.
I’ve been with them for three years now, and that alone should say something.

text: I had just an amazing experience with Andrina and Faijan! I removed the permanent brow make up. Andrina explained all the details of the procedures and Faijan did absolutely great job! She gave me time between the pulses and answered all my questions. 100% satisfied

text: I just had my first tattoo removal session and I was honestly really nervous because I had never done it before. Andrina and Foujan were amazing. They were so patient and took the time to calm me down and explain everything to me. They made me feel comfortable the whole time and didn’t rush me at all. The session went way better than I expected because of how supportive they were. If you’re scared or thinking about tattoo removal, I definitely recommend coming here. They really care and make the experience so much easier.
author: Martin Flores
